name: Waikiki Gold And Silver
description_short: Waikiki Gold and Silver buys, sells, and trades precious metals, jewelry, antiques, and collectibles at two locations in Honolulu and Las Vegas, offering collateral loans and estate liquidation services.
description_long:
Waikiki Gold and Silver is a state-licensed, bonded, and insured precious metals and jewelry buyer with over a decade of operating history across Honolulu and Las Vegas. The company positions itself as a high-paying buyer for gold, silver, fine jewelry, antiques, collectibles, and art, emphasizing competitive cash offers and professional service. They operate on what they claim are among the smallest margins in the industry and note that even competitors sell inventory to them.

The company offers a range of services beyond simple buying. At their Honolulu location, they provide pawn and collateral loans, allowing customers to receive fast cash by using items as security. They also operate retail galleries selling jewelry from inventory, offer custom jewelry design and creation services, and provide estate liquidation consulting for customers looking to sell large collections or entire estates. All evaluations are described as free and no-commitment.

Waikiki Gold and Silver differentiates itself through claimed expertise in premium categories including designer jewelry, antique pieces, and Native American art and jewelry. They emphasize personalized service, comfortable selling experiences, and professional staff. Their extended hours (10am-10pm daily) and dual-location model provide geographic accessibility. Customer testimonials highlight fair pricing, professional treatment, and straightforward transactions without high-pressure tactics.

The core business model is a traditional pawn and precious metals buyer rather than a lender. While they offer collateral loans in Honolulu, the primary revenue stream appears to be purchasing items outright. Customers should understand this is transactional commerce—not a credit solution—and offers are based on spot market prices and the dealer's assessment of item value. No information is provided regarding loan terms, interest rates, repayment periods, or the specific collateral loan process.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Dual locations in Honolulu and Las Vegas provide geographic accessibility
Extended daily hours (10am-10pm every day) accommodate various schedules
State-licensed, bonded, and insured for consumer protection
Claims to operate on smallest margins in the industry and buy from competitors
Specializes in high-value categories including designer, antique, and Native American jewelry
Offers free, no-commitment evaluations with no obligation to sell
Full-service offerings including custom jewelry design and estate liquidation consulting
Over a decade of operating history with documented customer testimonials
cons: Collateral loan services only available at Honolulu location, not Las Vegas
No published information about loan terms, APR, repayment periods, or fees for pawn transactions
Offers are market-dependent and subject to dealer assessment; actual valuations require in-person evaluation
Limited online inventory visibility; most transactions require phone contact or in-person visit
No mention of alternative lending programs, credit counseling, or financial education services
best_for: People with jewelry, precious metals, or collectibles to sell or pawn for immediate cash
Estate liquidators needing professional appraisal and bulk purchasing of valuable collections
Customers seeking collateral-based short-term loans in the Honolulu area as an alternative to payday lending
Jewelry buyers looking for designer, antique, or custom pieces from an established retailer
diagnosis: Best for individuals with valuable items (jewelry, metals, collectibles, estates) seeking fair-market cash payouts or short-term collateral loans, particularly in the Honolulu area. Primary caveat: This is a transactional buyer/lender, not a credit-building or financial counseling service; loan terms and rates for pawn transactions are not disclosed online and require direct inquiry.
services: Buying precious metals (gold, silver) at claimed competitive market rates
Purchasing fine jewelry, antiques, collectibles, and art
Selling/trading items from retail gallery inventory
Estate liquidation consulting and bulk purchasing
Custom jewelry design and creation services
Phone and text consultation for valuations
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 808 S Las Vegas Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89101
meta_description: Waikiki Gold and Silver buys, sells, and trades precious metals, jewelry, and collectibles at locations in Honolulu and Las Vegas.
